nasb.text: Therefore I said to the sons of Israel, ‘No person among you may eat blood, nor may any alien who sojourns among you eat blood.’

esv.text: Therefore I have said to the people of Israel, No person among you shall eat blood, neither shall any stranger who sojourns among you eat blood.

cnv.text: 所以我對以色列人說：你們中間任何人都不可吃血，在你們中間寄居的外人也不可吃血。

ccb.text: 所以耶和华吩咐以色列人和寄居在以色列人中间的外族人不可吃血。
